exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.instruction: Keep ribs stacked over pelvis and squeeze the rear glute.

exercises.name: Foam Roll Quads
exercises.instruction: Move slowly and pause on tight tissue without holding your breath.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.instruction: Create a straight line from shoulder to ankle. Do both sides.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.instruction: Sit between your hips, keep chest tall, and drive the floor away.
exercises.coachTips: Use a weight you can control. Quality depth beats load.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instruction: Push hips back, keep shins quiet, and feel hamstrings load.
exercises.coachTips: Keep the weight close to your body like it is sliding down your legs.

exercises.name: Lateral Band Walk
exercises.instruction: Stay low in an athletic stance. Count reps each direction.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.instruction: Exhale as you extend and keep your lower back heavy on the floor.

exercises.name: Jump Rope
exercises.instruction: Light feet, tall posture, smooth rhythm.
exercises.coachTips: Relax the shoulders and let the wrists do most of the rope work.

exercises.name: Bike Sprint
exercises.instruction: Sprint hard, then recover fully before the next burst.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.instruction: Step back under control and drive through the front heel.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.instruction: Control depth and keep the front knee tracking over toes.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.instruction: Press straight out and resist rotation through your trunk.

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.instruction: Relax into the stretch and breathe through the nose.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.instruction: Move slowly enough that your torso does not shift.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.instruction: Jump with intent, land softly, and step down.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.instruction: Make every rep crisp and powerful.

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.instruction: Use the easier variation if the groin feels sharp.

exercises.name: Dynamic Warmup
exercises.instruction: Raise temperature, open hips, and build into game speed.

exercises.name: Full Court Run
exercises.instruction: Play or drill with game pace. Track effort and energy.

exercises.name: Cooldown Walk
exercises.instruction: Bring your heart rate down before stretching.
